name: Oxylabs Web Scraper MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from Oxylabs (oxylabs org) — a leading commercial web scraping infrastructure provider. Enables AI agents to fetch and process content from URLs using Oxylabs' Web Scraper API, providing proxy-backed web scraping with anti-bot bypass capabilities. Compete with BrightData in the enterprise web data space.
use_cases: Scraping web content without bot detection blocks from data collection agents
Fetching structured content from JavaScript-heavy sites from data extraction agents
Web data acquisition at scale with Oxylabs' global proxy network
Competitive intelligence and web monitoring from market research agents
not_for: Simple occasional web search (use Brave/Tavily — Oxylabs is for large-scale scraping)
Sites where scraping violates terms of service — check ToS before scraping
Teams needing free/cheap web data (Oxylabs is enterprise-priced)
best_when: An agent needs to reliably fetch web content from sites with bot protection, using Oxylabs' proxy infrastructure and scraping API to bypass restrictions and extract clean structured content.
avoid_when: You only need occasional web access or have budget constraints. Oxylabs is enterprise-priced for high-volume use. Also verify ToS compliance for target sites.

auth.notes: Oxylabs API credentials (username + password) required. Available from Oxylabs dashboard after account creation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial available; check oxylabs.io for current trial terms
pricing.paid_tiers: Usage-based pricing by GB transferred and request volume
pricing.notes: Oxylabs is enterprise-priced. Trial access available. Production at scale can be significant cost.

performance.rate_limits: Bounded by subscription tier and concurrent request limits

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Web scraping collects third-party data — verify ToS compliance for target sites
Usage-based pricing — uncontrolled agent scraping can incur significant costs; implement spending limits
Official from Oxylabs org — enterprise-grade implementation, well-documented API
Competitor to BrightData — similar enterprise capabilities; evaluate both for your specific use case
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Third-party web data collection. HTTPS to Oxylabs API. Credential authentication. SOC2/GDPR compliant. Verify legal compliance for scraping target sites.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise proxy infrastructure. Credential auth. HTTPS. SOC2/GDPR certified. Verify ToS for target sites.
